Operation 'post_hfc' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects, not_actionable. Original summary is missing entirely and description is too brief. Added actionable verb 'Create', specified input schema (HFCurationRequest), output schema (HFCurationResponse), and clarified the persistence side effect. This helps AI agents understand when to use this operation and what to expect.

data.current_description: Storing of a new Haplotype Frequency set.
data.summary_suggestion: Create and store new haplotype frequency data
data.description_suggestion: Creates and stores a new haplotype frequency curation record. Accepts an HFCurationRequest containing haplotype frequency data, population information, cohort details, and metadata. Returns an HFCurationResponse with the created record including a unique identifier and confirmation of stored data. This operation persists the haplotype frequency data to the system for future retrieval and analysis.
data.reasoning: Original summary is missing entirely and description is too brief. Added actionable verb 'Create', specified input schema (HFCurationRequest), output schema (HFCurationResponse), and clarified the persistence side effect. This helps AI agents understand when to use this operation and what to expect.

data.current_description: Get a list of all populations
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a list of all populations available in the haplotype frequency curation system. Returns a PopulationResponse containing population records with their associated metadata. This operation provides an overview of all populations for which haplotype frequency data has been curated.
data.reasoning: Summary is missing and description lacks specificity about return type and context. Added explicit return schema reference (PopulationResponse), clarified the scope (all populations in the system), and provided context about the operation's role in data discovery. data.current_description: Returns a population with its attached submissions
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves detailed information for a specific population identified by populationId, including all associated submissions. Requires the populationId path parameter. Returns a PopulationSubmissionResponse containing the population record and its complete submission history. Use this operation to access comprehensive population data and review all curated submissions for that population.
data.reasoning: Summary is missing and description lacks input/output clarity. Added explicit mention of required populationId parameter, specified return schema (PopulationSubmissionResponse), and clarified the relationship between population and submissions. Enhanced AI agent interpretability by explaining the parameter requirement and expected response structure.
